description: A detail fragment from a large battle painting showing the chaotic foreground of an ancient military engagement. A large, pale horse lies fallen on the ground, its body twisted, with a wound visible on its flank. Behind and above the horse, a dense mass of soldiers, weapons, armor, and banners creates a tangle of violent action. Spears, lances, and other weapons jut in every direction. The scene is dark and crowded, with bodies and equipment piled together in the confusion of close combat.
